    <h1 {...{
      "id": "customizing-your-inbox"
    }}>{`Customizing Your Inbox`}</h1>
    <p>{`This tutorial explains how to customize the appearance and behavior of the Inbox in your application.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` provides extensive customization options to match your app's design system. You can customize:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Visual Appearance`}</strong>{`: Background, spacing, padding, and unread indicators`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Pull-to-Refresh`}</strong>{`: Enable user-driven content refresh`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Custom Views`}</strong>{`: Loading, error, empty state, and heading views`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Content Cards`}</strong>{`: Individual card appearance through the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`ContentCardCustomizing`}</inlineCode>{` protocol`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`All customizations are applied to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` instance before or after displaying the view.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "visual-appearance-customization"
    }}>{`Visual Appearance Customization`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "background"
    }}>{`Background`}</h3>
    <p>{`Set a custom background for the inbox container. The background can be a color, gradient, image, or any SwiftUI view.`}</p>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "setting-a-color-background"
    }}>{`Setting a Color Background`}</h4>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

// Solid color
inboxUI.setBackground(Color.white)

// System colors (adapt to light/dark mode)
inboxUI.setBackground(Color(.systemBackground))

// Custom colors with opacity
inboxUI.setBackground(Color.blue.opacity(0.1))
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "setting-a-gradient-background"
    }}>{`Setting a Gradient Background`}</h4>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-1"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`inboxUI.setBackground(
    LinearGradient(
        colors: [Color.blue.opacity(0.1), Color.purple.opacity(0.05)],
        startPoint: .top,
        endPoint: .bottom
    )
)
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "setting-an-image-background"
    }}>{`Setting an Image Background`}</h4>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-2"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`inboxUI.setBackground(
    Image("inbox_background")
        .resizable()
        .aspectRatio(contentMode: .fill)
)
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Default: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Color(.systemGroupedBackground)`}</inlineCode>{` - adapts to light and dark mode.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "card-spacing"
    }}>{`Card Spacing`}</h3>
    <p>{`Control the spacing between content cards in the inbox.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-3"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

// Tighter spacing
inboxUI.cardSpacing = 8

// Default spacing
inboxUI.cardSpacing = 16

// Looser spacing
inboxUI.cardSpacing = 24
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Default: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`16`}</inlineCode>{` points.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "content-padding"
    }}>{`Content Padding`}</h3>
    <p>{`Set the padding around the content area of the inbox.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-4"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

// Uniform padding on all sides
inboxUI.contentPadding = EdgeInsets(top: 16, leading: 16, bottom: 16, trailing: 16)

// Different padding for each side
inboxUI.contentPadding = EdgeInsets(top: 20, leading: 12, bottom: 20, trailing: 12)

// Minimal padding
inboxUI.contentPadding = EdgeInsets(top: 8, leading: 8, bottom: 8, trailing: 8)
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Default: `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`EdgeInsets(top: 12, leading: 16, bottom: 12, trailing: 16)`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "custom-views"
    }}>{`Custom Views`}</h2>
    <p>{`The Inbox provides hooks to customize the loading, error, empty state, and heading views.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "custom-loading-view"
    }}>{`Custom Loading View`}</h3>
    <p>{`Replace the default loading view with your own custom view.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-5"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

inboxUI.setLoadingView {
    AnyView(
        VStack(spacing: 16) {
            ProgressView()
                .scaleEffect(1.5)
            Text("Loading your inbox...")
                .font(.headline)
                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
        }
        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "custom-error-view"
    }}>{`Custom Error View`}</h3>
    <p>{`Replace the default error view with your own custom view that displays the error.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-6"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

inboxUI.setErrorView { error in
    AnyView(
        VStack(spacing: 20) {
            Image(systemName: "exclamationmark.triangle.fill")
                .font(.system(size: 60))
                .foregroundColor(.red)

            Text("Oops! Something went wrong")
                .font(.title2)
                .fontWeight(.bold)

            Text(error.localizedDescription)
                .font(.body)
                .foregroundColor(.secondary)
                .multilineTextAlignment(.center)
                .padding(.horizontal)

            Button("Try Again") {
                inboxUI.refresh()
            }
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        }
        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
        .padding()
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "custom-empty-state-view"
    }}>{`Custom Empty State View`}</h3>
    <p>{`Replace the default empty state view with your own custom view.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-7"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

inboxUI.setEmptyView { emptyStateSettings in
    AnyView(
        VStack(spacing: 20) {
            // Use configured image and message if available
            if let image = emptyStateSettings?.image {
                image.view
                    .frame(maxWidth: 120, maxHeight: 120)
            } else {
                Image(systemName: "tray")
                    .font(.system(size: 80))
                    .foregroundColor(.gray)
            }

            if let message = emptyStateSettings?.message {
                message.view
                    .multilineTextAlignment(.center)
            } else {
                Text("No messages")
                    .font(.headline)
                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
            }

            Button("Refresh") {
                inboxUI.refresh()
            }
            .buttonStyle(.bordered)
        }
        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
        .padding()
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`emptyStateSettings`}</inlineCode>{` parameter contains the following properties:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`image: AEPImage?`}</inlineCode>{` - Image to display in the empty state`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`message: AEPText?`}</inlineCode>{` - Message to display in the empty state`}</li>
    </ul>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`emptyStateSettings`}</inlineCode>{` values when available and fall back to your custom defaults when settings are not provided.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "custom-heading-view"
    }}>{`Custom Heading View`}</h3>
    <p>{`Replace the default heading view or add a custom header to the inbox.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-8"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: Surface(path: "inbox"))

inboxUI.setHeadingView { heading in
    AnyView(
        HStack {
            Image(systemName: "tray.fill")
                .font(.title2)
                .foregroundColor(.blue)

            heading.text.view
                .font(.title)
                .fontWeight(.bold)

            Spacer()

            // Add a custom badge
            if inboxUI.contentCards.count > 0 {
                Text("\\(inboxUI.contentCards.count)")
                    .font(.caption)
                    .padding(.horizontal, 8)
                    .padding(.vertical, 4)
                    .background(Color.blue)
                    .foregroundColor(.white)
                    .clipShape(Capsule())
            }
        }
        .padding(.horizontal, 20)
        .padding(.vertical, 16)
        .background(
            LinearGradient(
                colors: [Color.blue.opacity(0.1), Color.purple.opacity(0.05)],
                startPoint: .leading,
                endPoint: .trailing
            )
        )
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`heading`}</inlineCode>{` parameter contains:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`text: AEPText`}</inlineCode>{` - The heading text configured in Adobe Journey Optimizer`}</li>
    </ul>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`If heading properties are not configured in Adobe Journey Optimizer, the default heading view is still displayed with default styling. The custom heading view takes priority if provided.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "customizing-content-cards"
    }}>{`Customizing Content Cards`}</h2>
    <p>{`Individual content cards within the Inbox can be customized using the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ContentCardCustomizing`}</inlineCode>{` protocol. This is the same protocol used for standalone content cards.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "applying-content-card-customizations"
    }}>{`Applying Content Card Customizations`}</h3>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-9"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`class InboxCardCustomizer: ContentCardCustomizing {

    func customize(template: SmallImageTemplate) {
        // Customize UI elements
        template.title.textColor = .primary
        template.title.font = .headline
        template.body?.textColor = .secondary
        template.body?.font = .subheadline

        // Customize background
        template.backgroundColor = .white

        // Customize buttons
        template.buttons?.first?.text.font = .callout
        template.buttons?.first?.backgroundColor = .blue
    }

    func customize(template: LargeImageTemplate) {
        // Customize large image cards differently
        template.title.font = .title2
        template.backgroundColor = Color(.systemBackground)
    }
}

// Apply the customizer to the inbox
let inboxSurface = Surface(path: "inbox")
let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(
    for: inboxSurface,
    customizer: InboxCardCustomizer()
)
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`For detailed information on customizing content cards, see:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../../../content-card-ui/iOS/tutorial/customizing-content-card-templates.md"

    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "best-practices"
    }}>{`Best Practices`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "1-apply-customizations-early"
    }}>{`1. Apply Customizations Early`}</h3>
    <p>{`Apply all customizations to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxUI`}</inlineCode>{` instance immediately after creation, before the view is displayed.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-10"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`let inboxUI = Messaging.getInboxUI(for: surface)

// Apply customizations immediately
inboxUI.cardSpacing = 12
inboxUI.setBackground(Color.blue.opacity(0.1))
inboxUI.isPullToRefreshEnabled = true

// Then display
return inboxUI.view
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "2-respect-campaign-configuration"
    }}>{`2. Respect Campaign Configuration`}</h3>
    <p>{`When customizing empty state and heading views, use configured values when available.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-11"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`inboxUI.setEmptyView { emptyStateSettings in
    AnyView(
        VStack {
            // Use configured image if available, otherwise use default
            if let configuredImage = emptyStateSettings?.image {
                configuredImage.view
            } else {
                Image("default_empty_icon")
            }

            // Use configured message if available, otherwise use default
            if let configuredMessage = emptyStateSettings?.message {
                configuredMessage.view
            } else {
                Text("No content available")
            }
        }
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "3-test-light-and-dark-modes"
    }}>{`3. Test Light and Dark Modes`}</h3>
    <p>{`Always test your customizations in both light and dark mode.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{

`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "4-maintain-consistency"
    }}>{`4. Maintain Consistency`}</h3>
    <p>{`Keep your Inbox customizations consistent with your app's overall design system.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Swift" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "swift-13"
    }}>{`Swift`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
      }}>{`// Define constants for consistency
struct DesignSystem {
    static let cardSpacing: CGFloat = 16
    static let contentPadding = EdgeInsets(top: 12, leading: 16, bottom: 12, trailing: 16)
    static let primaryGradient = LinearGradient(
        colors: [Color.blue.opacity(0.1), Color.purple.opacity(0.05)],
        startPoint: .top,
        endPoint: .bottom
    )
}

// Apply consistently
inboxUI.cardSpacing = DesignSystem.cardSpacing
inboxUI.contentPadding = DesignSystem.contentPadding
inboxUI.setBackground(DesignSystem.primaryGradient)
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
